title: API Developer Portal
description: Public facing portal for API management with server-side API routes and OAuth/OIDC integration. Enables secure server-side access to enterprise product catalogs.

title: API Provider Portal
description: Enterprise API Providers portal, Managing access to product's subscriptions and API versions specifications. Built with monorepo architecture and Apollo GraphQL as BFF layer.

title: API Consumer Portal
description: Enterprise API Consumers portal, Managing subscriptions requests to products and API versions specifications. Built with monorepo architecture and Apollo GraphQL as BFF layer.

title: DT-DDS (UI Component Library)
description: Reusable React component library standardizing UI, theming, and development practices across multiple applications. Built and scaled to support enterprise-grade applications.

title: Technology Radar
description: Technology tracking and visualization platform for emerging technology assessment. Helps teams evaluate and adopt new technologies strategically.
